description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On the documentary site, find an in-person evening screening in New York City on a Saturday in October 2026 and add 2 tickets for the cheapest available evening showtime that day to your cart.
tasks.name: On the documentary site, find an in-person evening screening in New York City on a Saturday in October 2026 and add 2 tickets for the cheapest available evening showtime that day to your cart.
tasks.description: On the documentary site, find an in-person evening screening in New York City on a Saturday in October 2026 and add 2 tickets for the cheapest available evening showtime that day to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Use the site's newsletter form to subscribe for weekly summary emails focused only on in-person screenings and educational resources for Los Angeles.
tasks.name: Use the site's newsletter form to subscribe for weekly summary emails focused only on in-person screenings and educational resources for Los Angeles.
tasks.description: Use the site's newsletter form to subscribe for weekly summary emails focused only on in-person screenings and educational resources for Los Angeles.

tasks.instruction: From the online viewing options, add an individual streaming rental in HD to your cart that costs under $15 and provides at least 72 hours of access, choosing the first result after applying those filters.
tasks.name: From the online viewing options, add an individual streaming rental in HD to your cart that costs under $15 and provides at least 72 hours of access, choosing the first result after applying those filters.

tasks.instruction: In the video gallery, create a playlist containing 3 short clips under 5 minutes that are tagged with the climate theme.

target_names: City Council Showdown on Climate Justice
Morning of the School Climate Strike

tasks.name: In the video gallery, create a playlist containing 3 short clips under 5 minutes that are tagged with the climate theme.

tasks.instruction: Submit a classroom screening request for a high school group of 28 students at a school in Chicago on a weekday in November 2026 during school hours, filling in all required school and contact details.
tasks.name: Submit a classroom screening request for a high school group of 28 students at a school in Chicago on a weekday in November 2026 during school hours, filling in all required school and contact details.

tasks.instruction: From the filmmakers section, open the primary director's profile and add the two most recent films released after 2015 to your watchlist.
tasks.name: From the filmmakers section, open the primary director's profile and add the two most recent films released after 2015 to your watchlist.
tasks.description: From the filmmakers section, open the primary director's profile and add the two most recent films released after 2015 to your watchlist.

tasks.instruction: On the main trailer page, open the Twitter/X share dialog, write a custom message of at least 50 characters that ends with the hashtag #OurClimateFuture, and use the site's copy function to copy it.
tasks.name: On the main trailer page, open the Twitter/X share dialog, write a custom message of at least 50 characters that ends with the hashtag #OurClimateFuture, and use the site's copy function to copy it.
tasks.description: On the main trailer page, open the Twitter/X share dialog, write a custom message of at least 50 characters that ends with the hashtag #OurClimateFuture, and use the site's copy function to copy it.

tasks.instruction: In the reviews section, save 2 reviews published in 2024 or later with ratings of at least 4 out of 5 to your reading list, starting from the most recent.

target_names: ‘Our Climate Future’ Bridges Science and Grassroots Hope
A Ground-Level View of the Climate Fight

tasks.instruction: Configure the site's accessibility and player settings to use a high-contrast theme with English subtitles, the original audio track, and autoplay turned off, then start playing the main trailer with those settings.
